prompt: Create a photorealistic close-up macro landscape of a field of blue nemophila flowers at sunrise, shot from a very low ground-level perspective among the stems. The foreground is filled with many delicate cup-shaped blue blossoms and green foliage, with dew droplets sparkling along petals, stems, and serrated leaves. One taller flower on the left side stands slightly above the others and is the main sharp focal point, its translucent blue petals rim-lit by warm light. Surrounding flowers recede into soft bokeh, with blurred blue blossoms in the immediate foreground and midground. In the background, a glowing low sun near the upper right horizon shines through a hazy pastel sky, blending golden yellow, peach, coral, pink, and lavender tones. Use shallow depth of field, cinematic natural lighting, warm sunset backlight, crisp dew highlights, dreamy atmosphere, realistic lens blur, high detail on the focused flower, soft distant horizon, no people, no buildings, no text.
